_meta.method: Web research on Thai Plum Village (Pak Chong) and Chung Tai Thailand branch.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Medium-high for institutional Zen / Chan presence; Thai Buddhism is overwhelmingly Theravada, so standing Zen sites are few.
knownGaps: Soto Zen Thailand (Tokuun Tasaki line) referenced in brief not located via sourced URL.
Wat Prap Pra Yoon Plum Village reference in brief is dated; Thai Plum Village is the official Plum Village monastery in Thailand.

places.name: Thai Plum Village International Practice Center
places.lineage: Plum Village / Vietnamese Thien (Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.address: Ban Sra Nam Sai, Moo 7, Tambon Pongtalong, Pak Chong District, Nakhon Ratchasima, Thailand
places.notes: Plum Village monastery founded 2008; current campus near Khao Yai National Park since 2013, ~240 km NE of Bangkok. Trilingual programs (Vietnamese/English/Thai).

places.name: Great Buddha Monastery (Chung Tai Thailand)
places.address: 91 Soi Praram 9 Hospital, Rama 9 Road, Bangkapi, Huai Khwang, Bangkok 10310, Thailand
places.notes: Thai branch monastery of Chung Tai Chan Monastery.
